name: Okta Accounts Never Used After Provisioning
description: Detects active okta accounts older than 30 days with no successful login recorded.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.login AS account_name, u.created AS created_at FROM okta_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND u.last_login IS NULL AND u.created < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Remove or disable unused accounts and confirm provisioning flows are not creating unnecessary access.
